actions.action: Search for 'yorushika aporia' using the search bar
actions.expectedResult: Search results are displayed, listing videos related to 'yorushika aporia'.

actions.action: Click on the video with the title 'ヨルシカ - アポリア（OFFICIAL VIDEO)'
actions.expectedResult: The video player is displayed and the video title corresponds to the selection.

actions.action: Search for an extremely long random string
actions.expectedResult: YouTube shows no results or displays a 'no results found' message.

actions.action: Navigate to the iPhone section from the top menu
Click on the 'Compare all models' button and scroll a little to see all the models
actions.expectedResult: A comparison page is displayed showing three iPhone models side by side.

actions.action: Use selection to compare iPhone 16, iPhone 16 Pro, and iPhone 16 Pro Max.
actions.expectedResult: iPhone 16, iPhone 16 Pro, and iPhone 16 Pro Max are displayed side by side.
Login is successful and the user is redirected to the inventory page.

actions.action: Add 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' to the cart and click on the cart icon
actions.expectedResult: 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' is added to the cart and the cart page is displayed.

actions.action: Fill in the checkout form with first name 'John', last name 'Doe', and zip code '12345' and click on the 'Continue' button
actions.expectedResult: The checkout overview page is displayed.
The checkout complete page is displayed.
